title: Senior Financial Analyst - Groww - Growth Opportunity

jsonLd.title: Senior Financial Analyst - Groww - Growth Opportunity
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Senior Financial Analyst with drive and ambition, Groww in Lucknow is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Groww:
Groww is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Monitor market trends and provide investment recommendations
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Python for Finance
• Proficiency in IFRS
• Proficiency in Financial Reporting
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in VBA
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Lucknow, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Groww!
